Module 6:
JV Launch, Part 4
!
Executive Summary
Let’s now assume you have a partner on board. A lot of people forget about
putting together a sequence to sell your partners on promoting your product
and doing it very well.
It’s a whole different level when they go all out for your launch - mailing just
once doesn’t do nearly as much. This sequence uses a lot of the mental
triggers I’ve already taught you.
Because of the support from my partners I’ve now done 10 or 11
consecutive JV launches and they’ve all done multi-millions of dollars.
My top partners might mail 8-10 times during the pre-launch and launch.
This is not because they’re my friends, but because they make money, they
align themselves with me, and they might get me to promote for them.
The sequence for why they should mail is very important - that’s the big
promise of the pre-launch. You want your partners to mail every piece of
pre-launch content: PLC 1, 2, and 3.
You also want them to mail when you Open Cart to your sales video. You
want them to mail when you Close Cart - I like them to mail 3 times there.
Each time they’re mailing your squeeze page your list is growing.
!

-- 1 of 2 --

Your software will cookie the prospect and track them to appropriately pay
commissions. However, JV Launches are inherently messier than Internal
Launches.
Sometimes a partner will jump in during your pre-launch and want to mail at
a random time. With a JV Launch you can’t assume that your partners will
mail for each piece.
Your goal should be to make money for your JV partners. Don’t test on
them, take care of them, and treat their list like gold.
Key Point: If your launch doesn’t convert well, other JV’s will talk and they
won’t mail for you next time.
!
